2603.17891.title: RAMP: Reinforcement Adaptive Mixed Precision Quantization for Efficient On Device LLM Inference
2603.17891.paper_summary: Post training quantization is essential for deploying large language models (LLMs) on resource constrained hardware, yet state of the art methods enforce uniform bit widths across layers, yielding suboptimal accuracy efficiency trade offs. We present RAMP (Reinforcement Adaptive Mixed Precision), an off policy Soft Actor Critic framework that learns per layer bit width assignments to minimize perplexity under a global bit budget. The policy conditions on an 11 dimensional embedding of activation statistics, weight properties, and structural descriptors, enabling zero shot transfer across model families and scales. To enable stable sub 4 bit quantization, we introduce Scale Folding, a preconditioning technique that migrates activation outliers into weights via per channel scaling and normalization layer compensation. A quality prioritized reward with asymmetric penalties and budget cliffs drives rapid convergence. On Llama 2 7B, RAMP achieves 5.54 perplexity at 3.68GB (3.65 effective bits), outperforming uniform 4 bit AWQ (5.60 at 3.90 GB) and GPTQ by 6% in size and 1% to3% in quality. Critically, a policy trained only on Llama 2 7B generalizes zero shot to Llama 2 13B and Mistral 7B, often surpassing target specific training, supporting the hypothesis that quantization sensitivity is primarily architectural. The HALO pipeline exports allocations to GGUF format for kernel free inference on CPUs, GPUs, and edge devices, retaining 99.5% of FP16 commonsense reasoning performance.
2603.17891.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練量化對於在資源受限的硬體上部署大型語言模型（LLMs）至關重要，但最先進的方法在各層之間強制執行均勻的位寬，導致準確性和效率之間的權衡不理想。<lb/>我們提出了RAMP（強化自適應混合精度），這是一個離線策略的軟演員批評框架，旨在學習每層的位寬分配，以在全球位預算下最小化困惑度。<lb/>該策略基於11維的激活統計、權重特性和結構描述符的嵌入，實現了跨模型系列和規模的零樣本轉移。<lb/>為了實現穩定的低於4位的量化，我們引入了縮放折疊，這是一種預處理技術，通過每通道的縮放和正規化層補償，將激活異常值轉移到權重中。<lb/>一種質量優先的獎勵，配合不對稱的懲罰和預算懸崖，促進了快速收斂。<lb/>在Llama 2 7B上，RAMP以3.68GB（3.65有效位）達到了5.54的困惑度，超越了均勻的4位AWQ（在3.90 GB下為5.60）和GPTQ，在大小上提高了6%，在質量上提高了1%到3%。<lb/>關鍵是，僅在Llama 2 7B上訓練的策略能夠零樣本泛化到Llama 2 13B和Mistral 7B，經常超越針對特定目標的訓練，支持量化敏感性主要是架構性的假設。<lb/>HALO管道將分配導出為GGUF格式，以便在CPU、GPU和邊緣設備上進行無內核推理，保留99.5%的FP16常識推理性能。
2603.17891.author: Arpit Singh Gautam et.al.
